businessActors.name: Banks and Credit Unions
businessActors.description: Represents the Banks and Credit Unions business constituency within the enterprise architecture scope.

businessActors.name: Lenders and Consumer Finance Providers
businessActors.description: Represents the Lenders and Consumer Finance Providers business constituency within the enterprise architecture scope.

businessActors.name: Fintechs, BaaS, and Embedded Finance Providers
businessActors.description: Represents the Fintechs, BaaS, and Embedded Finance Providers business constituency within the enterprise architecture scope.

businessCapabilities.name: Modernize Retail Banking Without Destabilizing The Bank
businessCapabilities.description: Business capability centered on modernize retail banking without destabilizing the bank within the domain operating model.

businessCapabilities.name: Launch Differentiated Deposit And Payment Propositions Faster
businessCapabilities.description: Business capability centered on launch differentiated deposit and payment propositions faster within the domain operating model.

businessCapabilities.name: Launch And Tune Loan Products Quickly
businessCapabilities.description: Business capability centered on launch and tune loan products quickly within the domain operating model.

businessCapabilities.name: Scale Responsibly Across New Markets And Segments
businessCapabilities.description: Business capability centered on scale responsibly across new markets and segments within the domain operating model.

businessCapabilities.name: Enable Partners To Launch Financial Products Through Apis
businessCapabilities.description: Business capability centered on enable partners to launch financial products through apis within the domain operating model.

businessCapabilities.name: Expand The Platform From One Product Line To A Broader Banking Stack
businessCapabilities.description: Business capability centered on expand the platform from one product line to a broader banking stack within the domain operating model.

valueStreams.name: Modernize retail banking without destabilizing the bank
valueStreams.description: Transform legacy banking stacks into a composable cloud banking foundation while preserving service continuity, compliance, and economics.

stages.name: Design the target product architecture
stages.description: Define which lending, deposit, and payment domains should move first and how the target operating model will be structured.

stages.name: Migrate products and accounts safely
stages.description: Plan and execute phased migration waves for portfolios, balances, customers, and servicing workflows.

stages.name: Integrate the surrounding banking stack
stages.description: Connect channels, CRM, KYC, payments processors, general ledger, and data platforms without creating new bottlenecks.

stages.name: Prove control and resilience
stages.description: Demonstrate that the target platform meets audit, security, regulatory, and operational resilience requirements.

valueStreams.name: Launch and tune loan products quickly
valueStreams.description: Create, launch, and iterate digital lending propositions across consumer, SME, and embedded-finance channels with minimal engineering bottlenecks.

stages.name: Configure loan products and policies
stages.description: Set rates, fees, schedules, limits, and policy variations for targeted customer segments or channels.

stages.name: Onboard applications from multiple channels
stages.description: Accept applications from direct channels, brokers, merchants, and ecosystem partners with a consistent backend flow.

stages.name: Automate servicing and exception handling
stages.description: Manage repayments, restructures, arrears, and customer support efficiently as loan volumes grow.

stages.name: Measure cohort performance
stages.description: Track portfolio behavior, unit economics, and operational load by product, partner, and cohort.

valueStreams.name: Enable partners to launch financial products through APIs
valueStreams.description: Provide a reusable platform that lets partner brands embed lending, deposit, or payment experiences without rebuilding regulated banking infrastructure for each deal.

stages.name: Onboard and configure partners
stages.description: Set up partner tenants, product access, workflow variations, and commercial rules with repeatable controls.

stages.name: Expose developer-ready banking services
stages.description: Deliver APIs, events, and documentation that partners can integrate into their own product journeys.

stages.name: Support partner operations at scale
stages.description: Handle exceptions, servicing requests, reconciliations, and incident response across many live partner programs.

stages.name: Measure partner performance
stages.description: Track partner launch speed, activation, throughput, quality, and commercial return.

operatingModelNotes: The Mambu enterprise architecture domain covers the business, application, data, and technology structures required to operate cloud-native banking, lending, servicing, and partner ecosystem capabilities.
Business capabilities should be mapped to accountable owners and supported by governed application services.
Cross-domain dependencies should be handled through explicit value streams and service contracts.
